texto: Inside the woods is an abandoned hotel.Trees grow in the lobbyand up through the rooms.Limbs jut out through the windows.It looks like outsideinside.I climb the treesthrough 1000 rooms.I look for youin each of them.You’re a long shiny line.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Zachary Schomburg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Inside the woods is an abandoned hotel.Trees grow in the lobbyand up through the rooms.Limbs jut …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, poem, through pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: Inside the woods is an abandoned hotel.Trees grow in the lobbyand up through the rooms.Limbs jut out through the windows.It looks like outsideinside.I climb the treesthrough 1000 rooms.I look for youin each of them.You’re a long shiny line.

texto: You are so high in the tree.If you jumpyou will live a full lifewhile falling.You will get marriedto a hummingbirdand raise beautiful part- hummingbirds. You will die of cancerin mid-air. I will not lie. It will be painful. You are a brave little boyor girl.
explicacao: Citação de Zachary Schomburg sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “You are so high in the tree.If you jumpyou will live a full lifewhile falling.You will get marrie…” articula vida, cancer, death em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como luto e death.
